descriptionText: Riva 102' Corsaro Super For Sale 2024| Guest Cabins: 5| Crew Cabins:5The Riva 102' Corsaro Super For Sale 2024 represents a rare chance to acquire a nearly new yacht from one of the industry’s most respected shipyards. Delivered in July 2024 to her owner in Hong Kong, this 30.2‑metre superyacht combines contemporary styling with a practical layout designed for comfortable cruising. She remains in good condition, carefully maintained since handover, and offers an appealing opportunity for a buyer who prefers immediate availability without the lead time of a new build.Yacht Specifications: • Brand: Riva • Year: 2024 • Length: 30.2 m • Max. Beam: 6.7 m • Construction: FRP • Draught: 2.3 m • Gross Tonnage: 171 GT • Location: Hong Kong • Max. Speed: 26 knots • Fuel Tank: 9,000 l • Water Tank: 1,320 l • Guest Cabins: 5 • Crew Cabins: 5 • Engines: 2 x MTU 2450HPThe updated design of the Riva 102' Corsaro Super For Sale 2024 focuses on clean exterior lines, generous windows and a sense of openness throughout. Riva has created spaces that feel naturally connected to the sea, both visually and physically. The result is a flybridge yacht that suits relaxed family time as well as more formal hosting, providing flexibility across different types of cruising.On board, the arrangement features five guest cabins, allowing accommodation for a variety of groups or extended stays. Large saloon windows and a well‑considered interior layout provide good natural light and a practical flow between guest areas. The flybridge, foredeck and aft cockpit each offer usable outdoor spaces, giving guests several choices for dining, lounging or simply enjoying time at sea. Crew areas are located separately, with five crew cabins to support professional service and smooth onboard operations.Performance comes from twin MTU 2450HP engines, giving the yacht a top speed of around 26 knots. This provides the ability to cover distances efficiently while maintaining the comfort expected from a modern flybridge cruiser. With a fuel capacity of 9,000 litres and a water tank of 1,320 litres, the yacht is suited to both coastal cruising and longer passages within the region.O2H2O originally sold this yacht to her current owner and has overseen her care since delivery, ensuring she has remained in good condition. For a buyer seeking a 2024‑model Riva without entering a new‑build queue, this off‑market opportunity offers a straightforward and appealing option. Her location in Hong Kong also provides convenient access for inspections and sea trials.Anyone seriously considering a Riva 102' Corsaro Super For Sale 2024 will appreciate the balance of style, capability and thoughtful design that Riva has achieved with this model. For further details, documentation or to arrange a visit on board, please get in touch.
descriptionHtml:
Riva 102' Corsaro Super For Sale 2024| Guest Cabins: 5| Crew Cabins:5

The Riva 102' Corsaro Super For Sale 2024 represents a rare chance to acquire a nearly new yacht from one of the industry’s most respected shipyards. Delivered in July 2024 to her owner in Hong Kong, this 30.2‑metre superyacht combines contemporary styling with a practical layout designed for comfortable cruising. She remains in good condition, carefully maintained since handover, and offers an appealing opportunity for a buyer who prefers immediate availability without the lead time of a new build.

Yacht Specifications:
• Brand: Riva
• Year: 2024
• Length: 30.2 m
• Max. Beam: 6.7 m
• Construction: FRP
• Draught: 2.3 m
• Gross Tonnage: 171 GT
• Location: Hong Kong
• Max. Speed: 26 knots
• Fuel Tank: 9,000 l
• Water Tank: 1,320 l
• Guest Cabins: 5
• Crew Cabins: 5
• Engines: 2 x MTU 2450HP

The updated design of the Riva 102' Corsaro Super For Sale 2024 focuses on clean exterior lines, generous windows and a sense of openness throughout. Riva has created spaces that feel naturally connected to the sea, both visually and physically. The result is a flybridge yacht that suits relaxed family time as well as more formal hosting, providing flexibility across different types of cruising.

On board, the arrangement features five guest cabins, allowing accommodation for a variety of groups or extended stays. Large saloon windows and a well‑considered interior layout provide good natural light and a practical flow between guest areas. The flybridge, foredeck and aft cockpit each offer usable outdoor spaces, giving guests several choices for dining, lounging or simply enjoying time at sea. Crew areas are located separately, with five crew cabins to support professional service and smooth onboard operations.

Performance comes from twin MTU 2450HP engines, giving the yacht a top speed of around 26 knots. This provides the ability to cover distances efficiently while maintaining the comfort expected from a modern flybridge cruiser. With a fuel capacity of 9,000 litres and a water tank of 1,320 litres, the yacht is suited to both coastal cruising and longer passages within the region.

O2H2O originally sold this yacht to her current owner and has overseen her care since delivery, ensuring she has remained in good condition. For a buyer seeking a 2024‑model Riva without entering a new‑build queue, this off‑market opportunity offers a straightforward and appealing option. Her location in Hong Kong also provides convenient access for inspections and sea trials.

Anyone seriously considering a Riva 102' Corsaro Super For Sale 2024 will appreciate the balance of style, capability and thoughtful design that Riva has achieved with this model. For further details, documentation or to arrange a visit on board, please get in touch.
